# Test fixtures

Drop a TrueType (`.ttf`) font into this directory as `Sample.ttf` to enable
the `font-patch-integration` round-trip test. Any TTF font works — JetBrains
Mono Regular, DejaVu Sans Mono, Geneva (`/System/Library/Fonts/Geneva.ttf`),
etc.

The patched output (`Sample.patched.ttf`) is generated by the test and can
be `.gitignored` if desired.
